title: Solapur University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Solapur University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Solapur University Result 2026 Out for Sem 4 and Sem 9 B.Arch, M.Com, and MA courses on the official website - sus.ac.in on 25 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Solapur University result.

content.text: Solapur University Result 2026 has been officially released for B.Arch Semester 9 and various PG courses including Master of Commerce Semester 4 and MA Geography Semester 4 examinations. Students who appeared for these UG and PG exams can now check their results online.

Solapur University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://www.sus.ac.in/. The university has published results for B.Arch repeater exams, M.Com fresh and repeater exams, and MA Geography repeater exams. Students can access their results by entering their seat number or login credentials on the result portal.

Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result, such as name, seat number, and marks obtained. In case of any discrepancy, they should immediately contact the university authorities for correction.

Solapur University has released the latest UG and PG semester results for the March 2026 examination session. Students can now check B.Arch, M.Com, and MA results online through the official website using their login credentials. The results include both fresh and repeater candidates.

Solapur University has activated the direct link to check B.Arch, M.Com, and MA semester results for the 2026 session. Students can easily view and download their results through the official portal using the links provided below.

links.label: Master of Commerce Sem 4 Fresh Result
Master of Commerce Sem 4 Repeater Result

sections.heading: How to Download Solapur University Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download Solapur University Result 2026:

items: Click on the "Examination" section on the homepage.
Enter your seat number or required details.
Your result will appear on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.
